name: Personal Features
description: Installs the owner's personal dev container tooling: Claude Code (wrapped to auto-connect to the IDE), productivity/navigation CLIs, gitleaks secret scanning, machine-wide Conventional Commits + secret-scanning git hooks, and shell enhancements (Starship, aliases, persisted history) - and persists Claude's, the gh CLI's, and shell history config across container rebuilds and across projects. This is the owner's personal, opinionated setup, not a configurable toolkit, so it has no options: tools are added or removed outright rather than gated behind flags.
